personal.name: Jobayer Hosen
personal.title: Frontend Engineer
personal.intro: Frontend Engineer specializing in building scalable multi-role dashboards, e-commerce and marketplace systems using React, React Native, and Next.js. Experienced in architecting production-grade applications with real-time data flows, complex role-based systems, and transactional workflows.
personal.description: I build cross-platform applications using React Native and Next.js with a strong focus on clean architecture, performance optimization, and AI-assisted development. I'm passionate about writing production-level code that delivers exceptional user experiences.

experience.description: Own and evolve the Findit marketplace frontend. Implemented scalable multi-product cart and checkout system with integrated payment gateway. Solely led and developed BaruLagi (sustainable fashion marketplace) frontend from Figma to production-grade Next.js platform.

Built dual-sided agricultural marketplace connecting farmers and buyers across mobile app (Expo, React Native) and web (Next.js). Designed multi-method JWT-based authentication and implemented complex grain trading workflows with offer/bid creation and negotiation.

Revamped and maintained cross-platform e-commerce application used by 15,000+ pharmacy owners monthly. Designed and developed delivery management app with geo-location tracking and real-time status updates. Contributed to multiple internal dashboards automating procurement, inventory, and reporting.
